Notes: Prerequisite proves the A rrset exists at multi.campus.edu. while the UPDATE attempts to delete a specific A RR that is not present.

Steps.Description: Require the A rrset at multi.campus.edu. to exist, then delete a non-member A RR from that rrset.

Steps.Name: multi.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A rrset remains unchanged after the UPDATE.
